title: dianthus cretaceus subsp. dmanissianus
intro: Dianthus cretaceus subsp. dmanissianus is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to Armenia. It is also known as the "Dmanisi pink" due to its vibrant pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Dianthus cretaceus subsp. dmanissianus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to promote health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, with herbal preparations including infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
